242 How to Judge a Horoscope
Chart No. 106.—Born on 30129-5-1902 at 3-19 a.m. (L.T.)
(Lot. 17° N., Long. 81° 46' E.)
Balance of Rahu Dasa at birth : Years 14-1-1.
children. From Chandra Lagna, the 5th house is well fortified by
the presence of Mercury, the 5th lord. The 5th lord Sun has
gained 5 Navamsas. He is in Vargottama. Besides this, the
mid-point of the 5th bhava falls in the same Navamsa.
Consequently trebling the number of Navamsa gained by
the Sun, we have 15, the probable number of children to be
born. Actually so far 13 children have been born out of
which, due to affliction of the 5th lord and Putrakaraka by
Mars and Saturn respectively, the native has lost 3 issues.
Chart No. 107 is peculiar in the sense that the native
has no sons but only daughters. The 5th from Lagna is an
even sign occupied by a hermaphrodite planet Mercury and
subject to Papakarthari Yoga.
